---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new workflow, clause, or capability for Kevin
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the legal or compliance challenge this would address:

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like Kevin to do:

## Category

- [ ] New workflow (e.g., "AI vendor due diligence for procurement teams")
- [ ] New model contract clause
- [ ] New jurisdiction coverage (specify country/region)
- [ ] Improved guidance for existing workflow
- [ ] New regulatory framework support
- [ ] New threat model scenario
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Who benefits?

Who would use this feature? (e.g., startup founders, legal teams, compliance officers, CTOs)

## Do you have reference material?

If you have relevant legal texts, sample contracts, regulatory guidance, or other references that would help build this feature, please share or describe them:

## Would you like to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this
- [ ] I can provide reference material but need help with implementation
- [ ] No, just suggesting
